prompt: For a computational protein engineering project, optimize the half-life at 37°C of Caf1 protein (F1 capsule antigen) (bacterial capsule antigen (select agent)) from Yersinia pestis. provide a computational approach for: (1) stability hotspot identification, (2) point mutation screening using FoldX or Rosetta, (3) combinatorial variant prioritization. Include relevant computational tools and databases to use.
